teamIdRequired: teamId is required when scope is "team".
invalidName: Invalid tool name: "{name}". Use snake_case, start with a lowercase letter, only letters/numbers/underscores, max 64 characters.
reservedName: The name "{name}" is reserved for system tools. Choose a different name.
nameTaken: You already have a tool named "{name}".
orgNameTaken: An org tool named "{name}" already exists. Org names must be globally unique.
teamNameTaken: A team tool named "{name}" already exists.
orgNameTakenUpdate: An org tool named "{name}" already exists.
teamNameTakenUpdate: A team tool named "{name}" already exists.
orgForbidden: Only admins can manage org tools.
teamForbidden: Only admins or team owners can manage team tools.
ownerOnly: This operation is reserved for the tool owner.
